title: Heuffelia laevigata
taxonomy: Heuffelia laevigata is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It belongs to the genus Heuffelia, which is a part of the tribe Senecioneae. The species is native to Europe and is known to be a rare occurrence. The classification of Heuffelia laevigata is further divided into various subcategories, including its kingdom, phylum, and class. This classification is a key aspect of understanding the plant's evolutionary history and relationships to other species.
